rationale: Legal name of the foreign corporation in its home jurisdiction. Per the entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction convention, foreign-qualification/registration forms use entity.home_jurisdiction_name (matches MLLC-12, FICT-4).

label_verbatim: FIRST: ('X' one box only.) This application is for a [ ] new ... registration of corporate name
rationale: Radio option for 'new' registration. Enum value: 'new'.

label_verbatim: FIRST: ... or [ ] renewal of a registration of corporate name
rationale: Radio option for 'renewal'. Enum value: 'renewal'. Mutually exclusive with Check Box8.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The state or country under the laws of which it is incorporated is
rationale: State or country of incorporation. Same key as MLLC-12's 'Jurisdiction where formed'.

label_verbatim: SECOND: ...the address of its principal office is located at: (line 1)
rationale: First line of principal-office address (street). Inferred split from 2-line widget composition with '(street, city, state and zip code)' label below the second line; mirrors the cover-letter mailing_address.{street, city_state_zip} primitive.
Second line of principal-office address (city/state/zip). The label '(street, city, state and zip code)' appears below this widget.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The date of its incorporation is
rationale: Date the foreign corporation was incorporated in its home jurisdiction. Matches MLLC-12 'Date of formation'.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: A brief statement of the nature of the corporation's business:
rationale: General description of the foreign corporation's business. Distinct from MLLC-12's entity.maine_business_purpose, which describes 'the nature of the business or purpose(s) to be conducted or promoted in the State of Maine' (Maine-scoped). This form's question is unscoped — it asks about the corporation's business generally — so a separate canonical key is appropriate.
Date of signature.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of any duly authorized officer) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity widget. Shape D. Footnote requires signature by 'any duly authorized officer'.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1; universal handle for entity name on this filing (typically populated with entity.home_jurisdiction_name).
Cover-letter row 2.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'. Note: this widget is named 'cover' (not 'cover5') on this template — drafter caught the rename correctly.
Total fees ($20/month × 12 = $240 for full-year new registration; $200 base for renewal per page-0 header, plus expedite premium).
Contact name.
Contact phone.
Filing-specific contact email.

label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Persistent annual-report reminder email.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined.
